{{Infobox concept
| name = Overlady
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An Overlady represents a high level of power and spiritual advancement, positioned above the rank of [[Underlady]]. This stage is achieved through an [[Overlord revelation]], which serves as a method for an individual to refocus and recognize their true identity. Those who reach this level possess immense spiritual pressure, enhanced hearing that exceeds the senses of [[Jades]], and significant physical resilience, making even minor injuries trivial. The power associated with an Overlady can be channeled into techniques or weapons, such as [[soulfire]] or specialized arrows, to create devastating force. While an Overlady is significantly more powerful than an [[Underlord]] or [[Lowgold]], they are still considered less capable than a [[Herald]]. Advancing to this stage can be a complex process, and if handled incorrectly during spiritual stress or advancement attempts, an individual may fail to reach the next level and instead become a pseudo-Herald.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Overlady]] is a temporary advancement.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|An ordinary [[Overlady]] would not be killed by falling flat on her face.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An [[Overlady]] can find trivial damage to be an inconvenience.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A veiled and invisible [[Overlady]] flew up behind [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] clapped a nearby [[Overlady]] on the shoulder.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
